Hi Bobijam, could you create a test that fails before this change? I mean a test that really shows the problem this is fixing.

I don't understand why we should prohibit mirror extend when there are stale mirrors.

parents.subject: LU-14204 tests: make sure we have a single import

commit.subject: LU-14512 flr: prohibit extend file with stale mirror
commit.message:
LU-14512 flr: prohibit extend file with stale mirror

Don't allow FLR file with stale mirror to extend new mirror, need
to resync it first.

Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I36c465147667a5788dae96d1c62b313f3b40208a
